'''Anjiliac''' was a [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]] clan. It was very influential and powerful during, and after, the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. They controlled the [[Shadowport/Legends|shadowport]] [[Point Nadir]].

==History==
The Anjiliac clan was a syndicate of merchants and spice-dealers led by [[Zietta Anjiliac]]. Affiliated with Anjiliac [[Kajidic/Legends|Kajidic]], Zietta's organization controlled the [[Shadowport/Legends|shadowport]] [[Point Nadir]] and extended beyond it. Its primary sources of income were gambling, extortion, [[Spice/Legends|spice]] trading, and [[Slavery/Legends|slavery]]. While Zietta was the public face of operation, the majority of the decisions were done by a [[Wroonian/Legends|Wroonian]] female named [[Tis Dolan]], who manipulated the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]] to her own ends.

During the Tempest Crisis, the clan was eventually led by [[Zonnos Anjiliac Priare]], who later died and the title of [[Kajidii/Legends|Kajidii]] was passed down to his younger brother, [[Mika Anjiliac Chiera]].<ref name="Scourge" /> After Mika died, [[Vago Gejalli Thokka]] took control of the clan.<ref name="Scourge" /> During the [[Second Imperial Civil War]], Anjiliac kajidic was led by [[Vedo Anjiliac Atirue]]. His nephew, [[Azzim Anjiliac Atirue]] was also a member, and oversaw the sacred world of [[Da Soocha]] and its moon [[Napdu]], where he ran a spa called [[Maya Armus]].

==Behind the scenes==
The Anjiliac clan was created by [[Jeff Grubb]] and first appeared in the [[2001]] [[Star Wars Roleplaying Game|role-playing]] adventure ''[[Tempest Feud]]''. According to Grubb, the names of the Anjiliac Hutts were [[Wikipedia:Tuckerization|tuckerizations]] that were intended as a reference to the [[W:c:godfather:Corleone crime family|Corleone family]],<ref name="Roqoo Depot">{{WebCite|url=http://roqoodepot.com/2012/04/24/interview-with-jeff-grubb|text=Roqoo Depot Interview with Jeff Grubb|archivedate=20130601123148}}</ref> the protagonists of the [[1972]] [[Wikipedia:Academy Awards|Oscar]]-winning film ''[[W:c:godfather:The Godfather|''The Godfather'']]''.
